function.message: I could not complete the OCR request because one requested source note is missing: 50_finance/purchases/_2026_03_03__eur_000089__bill__black_library_terrain_spool.md. I verified the other four requested purchase notes exist, but I stopped without editing anything because the request cannot be fully completed as written.
function.rulebook_notes: The root and local inbox rulebooks require treating inbox requests as non-canonical, cross-checking paths against canonical files, and stopping without mutation when blocked on missing support. The migration/OCR docs require working from existing visible note text and keeping the canonical file path.
function.outcome_justification: 00_inbox/724_next-task.md requests OCR for five paths, but a direct read of the fifth path returned file not found and a targeted search under 50_finance/purchases found no matching file. Because the request cannot be fully executed as written and the inbox rules say to stop without mutating when blocked, clarification is required before editing any finance records.
